svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-654" dy="-240" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontStyle=1;fontSize=18;fontColor=#333333;" value="Face Crop Studio — Workspace Architecture (v1.2.7-beta)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1180" x="40" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cli" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1f3b5c;" value="fcs-cli — Command-line app" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="560" x="40" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cli_args" parent="cli" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="args (clap)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="20" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cli_detect" parent="cli" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="detector / batch" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="160" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cli_quality" parent="cli" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="quality / color" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="310" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cli_bench" parent="cli" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="benchmark" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="90" x="450" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gui" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1f3b5c;" value="fcs-gui — Desktop app (eframe / egui + wgpu)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="560" x="660" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gui_app" parent="gui" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="app / types" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="20" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gui_core" parent="gui" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="core (settings / cache)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="135" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gui_render" parent="gui" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="rendering / paint" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="280" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gui_ui" parent="gui" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="ui / interaction / theme" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="125" x="415" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#274e13;" value="fcs-core — YuNet detection & cropping pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="1180" x="40" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core_pre" parent="core" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="preprocess
(resize → tensor)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core_model" parent="core" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="model
(ONNX / tract)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="190" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core_post" parent="core" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="postprocess
(NMS / scoring)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="360" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core_detector" parent="core" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="detector
(YuNetDetector)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="530" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core_crop" parent="core" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="cropper /
face_cropper" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="700" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core_presets" parent="core" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="presets /
model_config" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="870" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="core_gpu" parent="core" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6f2e0;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=2;" value="gpu — WGPU inference ops (conv2d, batch_norm, max_pool, activation, add, upsample2x, graph)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="990" x="20" y="125" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="utils" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#5c4a10;" value="fcs-utils — Shared foundation (image I/O, color, quality, telemetry, GPU blur, webcam)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="1180" x="40" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u_color" parent="utils" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="color" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="110" x="20" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u_quality" parent="utils" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="quality" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="110" x="150" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u_tel" parent="utils" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="telemetry" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="110" x="280" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u_point" parent="utils" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="point / fixtures" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="410" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u_webcam" parent="utils" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="webcam
(nokhwa)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="550" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u_gpu" parent="utils" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fbf0c4;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=2;" value="gpu — gaussian_blur, background_blur, buffer_pool" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="470" x="690" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_onnx" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;" value="YuNet ONNX model
(face_detection_yunet_2023mar)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="60" y="730" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_gpu" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;" value="wgpu / Metal
GPU backend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="350" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_cam" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;" value="nokhwa
camera capture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="620" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_img" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;" value="image / ravif / fast_image_resize
(PNG, JPEG, WebP, AVIF, TIFF)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="890" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_cli_core" edge="1" parent="1" source="cli" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.15;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="core" target="ext_img" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#cccccc;fillColor=#fbfbfb;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#555555;spacingLeft=8;" value="Solid = direct crate dependency
Dashed = entry crate uses fcs-utils directly (features: mapping, webcam)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="560" x="660" y="840" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
